content: You're right — I listed the available pages but didn't actually open and show you what's in any of them. Let me fix that. Here's what the **overview** page returns:
reasoning_content:
The user is pointing out that I did show the pages - I listed them in my previous response. Let me clarify - I can get the actual data from any page they specify. Let me just show the overview page data as a starting point, or ask which page they want.

Actually, the user seems confused. I did list the pages. Let me just ask which page they want, or I can get the overview data to show them what's on a page.
